CustomField.description: If the boundary lines should include a margin and not extend to the border of the page. Printers usually are unable to print the lines completely otherwise. - https://rest.qr-invoice.cloud/swagger-ui/index.html#/11%20Payment%20Part%20%26%20Receipt%20(QR%20Bill)/createPaymentPartReceipt
CustomField.inlineHelpText: If the boundary lines should include a margin and not extend to the border of the page. Printers usually are unable to print the lines completely otherwise.
CustomField.label: Add Boundary Lines Margins
